overview.overview: 今日技术热点集中于多智能体协作框架的深化与AI应用层的创新，同时跨平台开发工具和开源游戏引擎持续活跃，显示出AI与开发者工具生态的融合趋势。
hot_trends: 多智能体协作与编排平台成为AI应用新焦点
跨平台UI框架与游戏引擎持续演进
AI训练效率优化与语音生成模型开源化

items.title: TokisanGames/Terrain3D
items.description: A high performance, editable terrain system for Godot 4.
items.cn_summary: Godot 4高性能可编辑地形系统。

items.title: 4ian/GDevelop
items.description: 🎮 Open-source, cross-platform 2D/3D/multiplayer game engine designed for everyone.
items.cn_summary: 跨平台开源游戏引擎，支持2D/3D/多人游戏。

items.title: ruvnet/ruflo
items.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features    enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
items.cn_summary: 面向Claude的多智能体编排平台，支持自学习与RAG

items.title: open-webui/open-webui
items.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
items.cn_summary: 用户友好的AI界面，支持Ollama和OpenAI。

items.title: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
items.description: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.
items.cn_summary: 开源语音与声音生成模型，支持多场景高保真。

items.title: crewAIInc/crewAI
items.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.
items.cn_summary: 多智能体协作框架，支持角色扮演与任务协同。

items.title: flutter/flutter
items.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond
items.cn_summary: 谷歌跨平台UI框架，快速构建移动应用。

items.title: Unabyss
items.description: MCP-native self-updating context layer for your AI

items.title: Demystifying Data Organization for Enhanced LLM Training
items.description: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized various fields, yet their training efficiency is heavily reliant on effective data curation. While data selection has been widely studied, the strategic data organization for enhanced training remains an underexplored area, particularly since current LLMs are often trained for only one or a few epochs. This paper systematically explores the influence of data organization on LLM training by reusing pre-computed sample-level scores originally genera
items.cn_summary: 数据组织优化以增强LLM训练效率
